Invalid clean config entries are still rejected during config loading before CLI can return a refused-target clean plan; a config-boundary repair may be required outside T018's current src/cli.js write scope.

If T018 cannot satisfy root/out-of-root refused-plan tests without changing config.js, create a focused repair task to relax clean normalization and update config tests.

Additional planner script verified clean_target_empty, clean_target_root, clean_target_outside_project, clean_target_ambiguous, and skipped_missing statuses.
